title: Making Kanamycin Base Stock Solution and Dilutions
author: Hendrick Read

steps.title: Weigh 0
steps.instruction: Weigh 0.5 g of Kanamycin Sulfate undetermined 00:02:00

steps.title: Add 10 ml of sterile H2O
steps.instruction: Add 10 ml of sterile H2O. Dissolve completely. 00:02:00

steps.title: Pre-wet a 0
steps.instruction: Pre-wet a 0.2 µm syringe filter by drawing through 5-10 ml of sterile H2O and discard water.

steps.title: Sterilize Kanamycin Stock through the prepared 0
steps.instruction: Sterilize Kanamycin Stock through the prepared 0.2 µm syringe filter. Stock may be kept at -20°C for 1 year. 00:02:00

steps.title: Dilution is to be done at 1:500 stock to water
steps.instruction: Dilution is to be done at 1:500 stock to water. Ex: Mix 2 µL stock of the prepared stock with 998 µL water for a 1mL solution
